free_text: Cross sections for reactions in 12C, 14N and 16O
induced by 50-MeV protons with three charged particles
The energy of the primary beam was defined by

Distribution has appearance of normal distribution
with 1 MeV half-width. Search for these disintegrations
was done in the photoemulsion region where proton
energy is varying from 45 to 55 MeV with maximum of
distribution at 50 MeV. This information was obtained
and error of different reaction channels, appearing
with solution a set of linear equations.
